title: Please share new project scope dashboards you have created?

. Gives us an overview of how many hours upcoming projects take, billable rate and amount based on resources hourly …

posts.author: Samiaali (Samia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

We are trying to come up with a board that can do the following

. Scope new projects from clients

. Gives us an overview of how many hours upcoming projects take, billable rate and amount based on resources hourly rate

. Compare the billable amount to clients project fee to see if it’s doable and within scope

Infor to be displayed

. Client

. Project name

. Different resources

. Hourly rate.

. Hours estimate

. Billable amount

. Budgeted amount

Hours per different project phases

We have several clients what’s the best way people setup their boards for new project scoping
